# SERVICE AGREEMENT

**This Agreement is made this ____ day of ____, 2026**

**BETWEEN:**
Adewale Okonkwo Consulting Ltd. (the "Provider")
**AND:**
BrightPath Nigeria Ltd. (the "Client")

**1. ENGAGEMENT**
The Client engages the Provider to supply strategic business advisory services.

**2. NATURE OF RELATIONSHIP**

2.1 The Provider is an independent contractor. Nothing in this Agreement creates a relationship of employment. The Provider is not a "worker" within the meaning of s.91 of the Labour Act (Cap. L1 LFN 2004) and accordingly the Labour Act does not apply to this engagement.

2.2 The Provider shall be responsible for its own tax affairs.

**3. FEES**
The Client shall pay the Provider a monthly retainer of ₦150,000.

**4. STATUTORY DEDUCTIONS**

4.1 The Client shall deduct and remit Pay-As-You-Earn (PAYE) income tax from the monthly fee at the rate applicable under the Personal Income Tax Act.

4.2 Pension contributions shall be made in accordance with the Pension Reform Act 2014: employer contribution of 10% and employee contribution of 8% of monthly emoluments.

4.3 The Client shall remit Nigeria Social Insurance Trust Fund (NSITF) contributions at 1% of the Provider's monthly emoluments.

4.4 The Client shall deduct National Housing Fund (NHF) contributions at 2.5% of the Provider's monthly salary.

4.5 The Client shall contribute 1% of its annual payroll to the Industrial Training Fund (ITF) in accordance with the Industrial Training Fund Act.

**5. TERM**
This Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and continue for six (6) months.

**6. TERMINATION**
Either party may terminate this Agreement on thirty (30) days' written notice. Obligations of confidentiality and accrued payment rights survive termination.

**7. GOVERNING LAW**
This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Federal Republic of Nigeria.

**SIGNED** for and on behalf of the Provider: ____________________
**SIGNED** for and on behalf of the Client: ____________________
